alkylation reagent: the HTP fraction enriched in VDAC proteins was directly alkylated using IAA
alkylation concentration: alkylated in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate pH 7.0 by the addition of iodoacetamide at a 1:1 molar ratio
cleavage agent: The digestion step was performed using trypsin at pH of 6.5 to 7.0
collision energy: using a normalized collision energy of 35 (a.u.)
fragmentation method: high energy collisional dissociation (HCD) was performed
instrument: mass spectrometry data were acquired in duplicate on an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid (Q-OT-qIT) mass spectrometer
ionization type: Eluted peptides were ionized by a nanospray (Easy-spray ion source, Thermo Scientific)
